programme.title: The Angel Levine, (1970, Comedy)
programme.desc: A sentimental tale of an elderly Jewish tailor (Zero Mostel) who has lost his faith in God and himself. Enter a Jewish angel (Harry Belafonte), on probation, who must earn his wings by convincing the tailor that life does have meaning.

programme.title: Billion Dollar Brain, (1967, Thriller)
programme.desc: A billionaire, intent on destroying Communism by starting a world war, is close to achieving his goal with the help of the world's largest, and most powerful, computer. Secret Agent Harry Palmer (Michael Caine) is the only man who can stop him!

programme.title: Alfie, (1966, Romance)
programme.desc: Alfie is not really a bad sort. It’s just that he has this overwhelming desire for the opposite sex. You might say that “birds’ are irresistible to him, sort of second nature.

programme.title: Lilies Of The Field, (1963, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Nominated for 5 Academy Awards® including Best Picture and winner of the Best Actor Oscar® for Sidney Poitier for his role as an itinerant handyman who stops to help five impoverished nuns and the small Arizona desert town in which they reside.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones, (1958, Thriller)
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: Paris Blues, (1961, Drama)
programme.desc: Ram (Paul Newman) and Eddie (Sidney Poitier) are two expatriate jazz musicians living in Paris, where their music is celebrated. When they fall in love with two vacationing American girls, they must decide if they should move back to America with them.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night, (1967, Crime)
programme.desc: Sidney Poitier and Rod Steiger (who won a Best Actor Oscar® for his performance) shine in this classic mystery-thriller that took home five Academy Awards®, including Best Picture and Best Adapted Screenplay. Lee Grant and Warren Oates also star.

programme.title: The Pride of the Yankees, (1942, Drama)
programme.desc: The story of the life and career of famed baseball player Lou Gehrig.

programme.title: Fear Strikes Out, (1957, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: True story of the life of Jimmy Piersall, who battled mental illness to achieve stardom in major league baseball.

programme.title: Paycheck, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: Michael Jennings works on top-secret projects. After each job, his memory is erased. After his latest assignment, he is shocked to be told that he agreed to forfeit all payment, until he receives an envelope containing clues to his forgotten past.

programme.title: Crank, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: Today is the last day of hit man Chev Chelios' life. He has been given a poison that will kill him if he allows his heart to settle into a normal rhythm. In order to stay alive and take revenge, Chev must keep his adrenaline elevated by any way possible.

programme.title: Crank 2 High Voltage, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: In this high-octane sequel, hitman Chev Chelios (Statham) launches himself on an electrifying chase through Los Angeles in pursuit of the Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Killer Elite, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: A special-ops agent must rescue his mentor.

programme.title: War, (2007, Action)
programme.desc: A full-throttle, martial arts thriller, WAR stars Jet Li and Jason Statham as two adversaries set on a violent collision course in the Asian mob underground.

programme.title: Chaos, (2005, Heist Films)
programme.desc: A brilliant thief has masterminded a series of high-stake bank heists, and for two detectives, the only hope for survival is finding an order to the chaos.

programme.title: Redemption, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: Ex-soldier Joseph Smith comes home from war but has been left disturbed by his experiences. Despite his intentions to start a new life, he becomes caught up in the criminal underworld, where he plots revenge on his friend's killer.

programme.title: Crank, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: Today is the last day of hit man Chev Chelios' life. He has been given a poison that will kill him if he allows his heart to settle into a normal rhythm. In order to stay alive and take revenge, Chev must keep his adrenaline elevated by any way possible.

programme.title: Crank 2 High Voltage, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: In this high-octane sequel, hitman Chev Chelios (Statham) launches himself on an electrifying chase through Los Angeles in pursuit of the Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Scream VI, (2023, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: The four Woodsboro survivors have moved to New York City for a fresh start. Just as they begin to feel safe again, they receive that infamous call. Ghostface reemerges more brutal and relentless than ever, stopping at nothing to hunt them down.

programme.title: Scream, (2022, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: Twenty-five years after a streak of brutal murders shocked the quiet town of Woodsboro, a terrifying new killer resurrects the Ghostface mask.

programme.title: Scream VI, (2023, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: The four Woodsboro survivors have moved to New York City for a fresh start. Just as they begin to feel safe again, they receive that infamous call. Ghostface reemerges more brutal and relentless than ever, stopping at nothing to hunt them down.

programme.title: The Wolf of Snow Hollow, (2020, Werewolves)
programme.desc: A small-town sheriff and his lackluster team of officers must solve a series of brutal murders that are occurring on the full moon. As he's consumed by the hunt for the killer, he struggles to remind himself that there's no such thing as werewolves…

programme.title: A Message from Brianna, (2021, Horror)
programme.desc: A Message from Brianna

programme.title: Midsommar, (2019, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: An American couple, their relationship foundering, travel to a fabled Swedish midsummer festival where they become trapped in a sinister nightmare.

programme.title: When a Stranger Calls, (2006, Teen Screams)
programme.desc: To Jill Johnson, it was the perfect babysitting job. The parents were away. The fridge was stocked. The children were tucked into bed. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: The Haunting In Connecticut, (2009, Horror)
programme.desc: After a family is forced to relocate for their son's health, they begin experiencing supernatural behavior in their new home, which turns out to be a former mortuary and séance parlor.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 2
programme.desc: Having defeated the "Anubis" Stand user Chaka, Polnareff pays a visit to a barber. But when the barber starts attacking him with Chaka's sword, the Frenchman realizes the sword itself is the Stand user.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 1
programme.desc: Hol Horse arrives at Cairo in order to pursue Jotaro and the others. He has joined forces with another partner and is after the lives of Jotaro and crew once more. What's more, his new partner is none other than Mondatta.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2
programme.desc: Following Mondatta's prediction, Hol Horse sticks his fingers into Polnareff's nose, but he doesn't know what to do from there. Making matters worse, Jotaro and the others show up in search of Polnareff, forcing Hol Horse into a tough spot.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.
programme.sub-title: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Killua passes the Hunter Exam on his second attempt and returns to the game. Once reunited, Gon, Killua and Biscuit begin collecting cards steadily.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: In order to stop Genthru from clearing the game, Gon and Killua are asked to join an alliance.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon and his friends meet the pirate boss Razor, but are overwhelmed by his power.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon and his friends team up with Hisoka and Goreinu to challenge Razor again. Also helping out is Team Tsezguerra.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon comes up with a plan to beat Razor, and it requires Killua's help.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon, Killua and Hisoka face Razor head on, and a winner will finally be crowned in this dodge ball showdown!

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Tsezguerra suggests that Gon and his friends should continue training while his team distracts Genthru.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Tsezguerra's group does not return to the game and a one-on-one battle ensues, with Gon taking on Genthru, Killua battling Sub and Biscuit taking on Bara.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon is overwhelmed by Genthru's power, but he isn't backing down.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon and his friends finally defeat Genthru and collect 99 trading cards.
programme.sub-title: Ging's Friends x And True Friends

programme.desc: Matsuda, the task force member assigned to watch Misa, is eager to distinguish himself.

programme.title: Death Note: Makeshift

programme.desc: The Yotsuba Group hires Eraldo Coil to uncover L's identity.

programme.title: Death Note: Guidance

programme.title: Last Holiday, (2006, African-American Romance)
programme.desc: Upon learning of a terminal illness, a shy woman (Queen Latifah) decides to sell off all her possessions and live it up at a posh European hotel.

programme.title: Beauty Shop, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: Gina is a long way from the Barbershop - she's moved from Chicago to Atlanta and buys a rundown salon and inherits a motley group of stylists and a colorful clientele. It's a rocky road to fulfilling her dreams, but you can't keep a good woman down!

programme.title: Set It Off, (1996, Action)
programme.desc: Jada Pinkett, Queen Latifah, Vivica A. Fox and Kimberly Elise star as four African American women living in a Los Angeles housing project who--pushed to the edge--resort to violence to escape poverty.

programme.title: Last Holiday, (2006, African-American Romance)
programme.desc: Upon learning of a terminal illness, a shy woman (Queen Latifah) decides to sell off all her possessions and live it up at a posh European hotel.

programme.title: Down in the Delta, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: In Maya Angelou's directorial debut, a troubled single mother spends the summer at her family's ancestral home in rural Mississippi and learns to reverse the downward slide of her life in this uplifting story of family, community and friendship.

programme.title: Mahogany, (1975, Drama)
programme.desc: Tracy, a young ghetto woman, puts herself through fashion school in the hopes of becoming one of the world's top designers. Her ambition leads her into the lives of people who are determined to get a piece of her long before she can realize her dream.

programme.title: Dreamgirls, (2006, Musical)
programme.desc: With showstopping performances by a star-studded cast, Dreamgirls soars with the amazing story of three female singers who learn that anything is possible when you hold on to your dreams.

programme.title: Knock Off, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme plays a fashion designer who must join forces with a C.I.A. agent to combat terrorism.

programme.title: Legionnaire, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Alain is a boxer in 1925 Marseille, France. When he doesn't take the dive paid to take by a mob boss, he has to split. He joins the Foreign Legion and is sent to Morocco. He makes 3 friends and they watch each other's backs.

programme.title: Replicant, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme squares off against his deadliest opponent yet -- himself -- when he stars as both a heinous serial killer and the replicated clone that scientists have constructed in order to kill him.

programme.title: The Order, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: Martial arts icon Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as a playboy criminal thrust into a dangerous world of ancient evil when he must investigate the disappearance of his archaeologist father. With Oscar winner Charlton Heston and Sofia Milos.

programme.title: Derailed, (2002, Adventure)
programme.desc: On an out of control train holding hostages and high-tech bio-weapons agent Kristoff (Van Damme) becomes a one man army to derail the terrorists and save the lives of everyone on board!

programme.title: In Hell, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: Kyle Leblanc, a man serving a life's sentence for killing his wife's murderer, must survive in a prison where hardened criminals battle to the death for the wardens' entertainment.

programme.title: Wake of Death, (2004, Action)
programme.desc: After his wife is brutally murdered, ex-mobster Ben Archer wages war against the Chinese triads. Starring action legend Jean-Claude Van Damme.

programme.title: Enemies Closer, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: Deep within a forest on the US-Canadian border, two sworn enemies must work together to escape a ruthless drug cartel hell-bent on retrieving a drug shipment which went missing there.

programme.title: The Bouncer, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: English & French w/English Subtitles. After an altercation leaves a bodyguard in jail, he must infiltrate a dangerous gang to secure his freedom and the custody of his daughter.

programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Dinner for Schmucks, (2010, Screwball)
programme.desc: There’s only one thing keeping aspiring executive Tim from corporate success. He must find the perfect guest to bring to his boss’s monthly dinner party, where the winner of the evening is the one who arrives with the biggest buffoon.

programme.title: The Truman Show, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: Truman doesn’t realize that his quaint hometown is a giant studio set run by a visionary producer/director/creator (Ed Harris), that folks living and working there are Hollywood actors, that even his incessantly bubbly wife is a contract player.

programme.title: The King of Comedy, (1983, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: The King of Comedy, (1983, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)

programme.title: Flawless, (1999, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: A tough, conservative security guard suffers a stroke during a bank robbery. His recovery requires voice lessons from his drag queen neighbor. The unlikely pair learn to look beyond their differences and find common ground in friendship.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: After providing inspiration to Will Shakespeare, his case of writer's block cured, and a taste for romance rekindled by the mysterious Lady Viola. Gwyneth Paltrow, Joseph Fiennes, Ben Affleck, and Dame Judi Dench star in this Best Picture winner.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman, (1982, Drama)
programme.desc: Loner Zack Mayo (Richard Gere) enters Officer Candidate School to become a Navy pilot and in thirteen torturous weeks, he learns the importance of discipline, love, and friendship.

programme.title: Benny & Joon, (2006, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic Drama about two misfits who Comedye together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.title: Best Men, (1999, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Drew Barrymore, Luke Wilson and Sean Patrick Flannery star in this hilarious action-comedy wherein Drew Barrymore is a young woman determined to have the perfect wedding day, despite the fact that the groomsmen have decided to rob the local bank.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: After providing inspiration to Will Shakespeare, his case of writer's block cured, and a taste for romance rekindled by the mysterious Lady Viola. Gwyneth Paltrow, Joseph Fiennes, Ben Affleck, and Dame Judi Dench star in this Best Picture winner.

programme.title: Proof, (2005, Drama)
programme.desc: Oscar-winners Gwyneth Paltrow and Anthony Hopkins star in this powerful story of a young woman haunted by her father's past and the shadow of her own future. Based on the Pulitzer Prize-winning play, PROOF also stars Jake Gyllenhaal and Hope Davis.

programme.title: Autumn In New York, (2000, Drama)
programme.desc: Autumn in New York follows the sexual exploits of Will Keane (RICHARD GERE) until he runs into an unexpected dead end when he meets Charlotte Fielding (WINONA RYDER). Charlotte is half Will's age and twice his match.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman, (1982, Drama)
programme.desc: Loner Zack Mayo (Richard Gere) enters Officer Candidate School to become a Navy pilot and in thirteen torturous weeks, he learns the importance of discipline, love, and friendship.

programme.title: Bull Durham, (1988, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a minor-league North Carolina baseball team (the Triple A Durham Bulls) and its attentive, intelligent groupie who feels it is her mission to live with one young player per season and help him mature.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: A new technologically-superior Soviet nuclear sub is heading for the U.S. coast; however, one CIA analyst thinks the captain will defect the submarine, and he only has hours to prove it.

programme.title: Patriot Games, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is caught in the middle of a terrorist attack. Ryan helps to thwart Holmes’ assailants and becomes a local hero. But Ryan’s act marks him as a target. Now he must return to action to save his family.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: When his mentor Admiral James Greer becomes ill, Ryan is appointed acting CIA Director of Intelligence.

programme.title: Get the Gringo, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: A career criminal nabbed by Mexican authorities is placed in a tough prison, where he learns to survive with the help of a young boy.

programme.title: Side Effects, (2013, Thriller)
programme.desc: A woman turns to prescription medication as a way of handling her anxiety concerning her husband's upcoming release from prison.

programme.title: A Most Wanted Man, (2014, Thriller)
programme.desc: Phillip Seymour Hoffman stars in this action-thriller from spymaster John Le Carre. German and U.S. intelligence agencies race to uncover the identity of a mysterious man.

programme.title: Panic Room, (2002, Thriller)
programme.desc: When her home is invaded by three armed robbers, a divorced woman and her young daughter hide in their specially designed panic room but end up in a deadly cat-and-mouse game anyway.

programme.title: Striking Distance, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Coming from a police family, Tom Hardy ends up fighting his uncle after the murder of his father. Tom believes the killer is another cop and goes on the record with his allegations. Demoted then to river duty, the killer taunts Tom.

programme.title: The Fighter, (2010, Drama)
programme.desc: Based on a true story, two brothers, against all the odds, come together to train for a historic title bout that has the power to reunite their fractured family and give their hard-luck town what it's been waiting for: pride.

programme.title: Boyhood, (2014, Drama)
programme.desc: Filmed over twelve years with the same cast, Richard Linklater's acclaimed smash hit is a groundbreaking celebration of life. Stars Ethan Hawke and Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins, (2016, Comedy)
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story, Meryl Streep delivers a hilarious and touching performance as a New York socialite who dreams of becoming a great opera singer, despite having a hilariously awful singing voice.

programme.title: The Pianist, (2002, Drama)
programme.desc: BEST PICTURE WINNER & 7-TIME OSCAR NOMINEE, THE PIANIST is director Roman Polanski’s most personal movie ever, and stars Oscar winner Adrien Brody in the true-life story of brilliant pianist, Wladyslaw Szpilman.

programme.title: The Fighter, (2010, Drama)
programme.desc: Based on a true story, two brothers, against all the odds, come together to train for a historic title bout that has the power to reunite their fractured family and give their hard-luck town what it's been waiting for: pride.

programme.title: Rudy, (1993, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: All Rudy Ruettiger wants in life is to play football for his beloved Notre Dame. Unfortunately, Rudy is no athlete, his academic record is spotty, and his family can't afford to send him to college.

programme.title: Sugar, (2009, Drama)
programme.desc: A gifted pitcher travels from his home in the Dominican Republic to play minor league baseball in the U.S., where he struggles with the new culture and the pressure of knowing that only his success can rescue his family.

programme.title: Damsel, (2018, Western)
programme.desc: A businessman travels West to join his fiancée in the mountains.

programme.title: Dead Man's Hand, (2023, Western)
programme.desc: In this intense Western starring Jack Kilmer, Stephen Dorff, and Cole Hauser, a gunslinger must fight for his life after killing the brother of a corrupt mayor.

programme.title: Texas Rangers, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Texas is at the mercy of murderous bandits. A group of unlikely heroes emerges to battle these renegade outlaws. Out-manned, they summon the courage to protect the innocent put the wrong things right in their beloved homeland.

programme.title: Union Bound, (2016, Faith & Spirituality)
programme.desc: Sargent Hoover went to war to preserve the Union. After being captured and sent to a prisoner of war camp, he understood what it was to be kept against his will. Together with a friend he escaped and aided by slaves made it to freedom.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun, (2015, Western)
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: True Grit, (2010, Drama)
programme.desc: True Grit is a powerful story of vengeance and valor set in an unforgiving and unpredictable frontier where justice is simple and mercy is rare.

programme.title: Texas Rangers, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Texas is at the mercy of murderous bandits. A group of unlikely heroes emerges to battle these renegade outlaws. Out-manned, they summon the courage to protect the innocent put the wrong things right in their beloved homeland.

programme.title: Woman Walks Ahead, (2018, Drama)
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this riveting western follows a headstrong New York widow (Jessica Chastain) as she journeys west to meet Sioux chief Sitting Bull, facing off with an army officer (Sam Rockwell) intent on war with Native Americans.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls, (2014, Fantasy)
programme.desc: When evil Archibald Snatcher decides to capture the Boxtrolls – lovable, box-wearing creatures – it’s up to Eggs and his friend Winnie to same them.

programme.title: ParaNorman, (2012, Fantasy)
programme.desc: Norman Babcock finds his paranormal abilities pushed to their limits to take on zombies and ghosts, and save his town from a centuries-old curse.

programme.title: Super 8, (2011, Adventure)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Bumblebee, (2018, Science fiction)
programme.desc: On a mission to protect Earth, the battle-scarred and broken Bumblebee is found and repaired by a teenager named Charlie. They must work together to save the planet from the evil Decepticons in this action-packed adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: Super 8, (2011, Adventure)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Bumblebee, (2018, Science fiction)
programme.desc: On a mission to protect Earth, the battle-scarred and broken Bumblebee is found and repaired by a teenager named Charlie. They must work together to save the planet from the evil Decepticons in this action-packed adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: The Big Short, (2015, Political Comedies)
programme.desc: Based on the true story of four outsiders who saw what the big banks, media, and government refused to: the global collapse of the economy. A bold investment leads them into the dark underbelly of banking, where everyone and everything is in question.

programme.title: Mermaids, (1990, Drama)
programme.desc: A sexy and unpredictable single mother of two is a source of constant embarrassment to her confused 15-year-old daughter, who's trying to deal with her own sexual awakening.

programme.title: Uptown Girls, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.title: Good Will Hunting, (1997, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: The hit Oscar-winning drama which launched the careers of Matt Damon and Ben Affleck tells the tale of a headstrong, working-class genius who's failing the lessons of life, until he meets a relatable psychology professor (Robin Williams).

programme.title: Drugstore June, (2024, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her small town is robbed, a girl who still lives at home with her parents takes matters into her own hands to solve the crime, while at the same time trying to get over her ex-boyfriend and become more of an adult.

programme.title: Troop Beverly Hills, (1989, Screwball)
programme.desc: Shelley Long discovers that when the going gets tough, the tough go camping in Troop Beverly Hills, a comedy about the lifestyles of the rich and outrageous. rated - PG

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility, (1995, Drama)
programme.desc: Emma Thompson stars in the captivating romance based on Jane Austen's classic novel of two sisters' search for love in strict Victorian society.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: A girl finds she is forced to educate herself on the etiquette of wooing the opposite sex when she finally meets Mr. Right.

programme.title: Hackers, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A., (1996, Action)
programme.desc: The man with the patch is back. Call him Snake. His job: wade through L.A.’s ruined landmarks to retrieve a doomsday device, with a wild assortment of friends, fiends and foes.

programme.title: Species, (1995, Sci-Fi Horror)
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker, and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Mimic, (1997, Creature Features)
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: The Relic, (1997, Horror)
programme.desc: Come in—if you dare. The opening-night gala for a new exhibit at Chicago's natural history museum is underway. But be advised: something terrifying wants to make sure no one ever leaves.

programme.title: Supernova, (2000, Sci-Fi Horror)
programme.desc: "Supernova" chronicles the search and rescue patrol of a deep space medical ship and its six-member crew.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A., (1996, Action)
programme.desc: The man with the patch is back. Call him Snake. His job: wade through L.A.’s ruined landmarks to retrieve a doomsday device, with a wild assortment of friends, fiends and foes.

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive, (1986, Cult Horror)
programme.desc: After a mysterious comet turns every machine on Earth into a homicidal rampage device, the survivors at the Dixie Boy Truck Stop are making a stand, and human vengeance goes into overdrive.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet, (1985, Werewolves)
programme.desc: Something is killing off townsfolk in Tarker's Mills. Something ingenious. Something remotely human. But the only person in town with courage to stop this lurking menace is a 13-year-old boy, confined to a wheelchair since birth.

programme.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey, (2022, Cult Horror)
programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: Spontaneous, (2020, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: Get ready for the most outrageous coming-of-age love story about growing up...and blowing up! When students in their school begin exploding (literally...), seniors Mara and Dylan struggle to survive in a world where each moment may be their last.

programme.title: The Ring, (2002, Horror)
programme.desc: When four teenagers all meet with mysterious deaths exactly one week after watching a videotape, investigative reporter Rachel Keller tracks down the video... and watches it.

programme.title: The Ring Two, (2005, Horror)
programme.desc: When evidence at a local crime scene reveals a mysterious unmarked videotape, Rachel realizes that Samara is back and more determined than ever to continue her relentless cycle of terror.

programme.title: Scream, (2022, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: Twenty-five years after a streak of brutal murders shocked the quiet town of Woodsboro, a terrifying new killer resurrects the Ghostface mask.

programme.title: Scream VI, (2023, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: The four Woodsboro survivors have moved to New York City for a fresh start. Just as they begin to feel safe again, they receive that infamous call. Ghostface reemerges more brutal and relentless than ever, stopping at nothing to hunt them down.

programme.title: Hush, (2016, Horror)
programme.desc: A deaf and mute writer who retreated into the woods to live a solitary life must fight for her life in silence when a masked killer appears at her window.

programme.title: Scream, (2022, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: Twenty-five years after a streak of brutal murders shocked the quiet town of Woodsboro, a terrifying new killer resurrects the Ghostface mask.

programme.title: Bright Lights, Big City, (1988, Drama)
programme.desc: Michael J. Fox plays a would- be writer who works as a fact checker for a Gotham magazine. He spends his nights as an active barfly in New York City's club scene. But after he is fired from the magazine, can the young fan find redemption?

programme.title: Terms of Endearment, (1983, Drama)
programme.desc: Terms of Endearment dazzled critics and audiences alike with its believable, insightful story of two captivating people, mother and daughter, unforgettably played by Shirley MacLaine and Debra Winger.

programme.title: Urban Cowboy, (1980, Drama)
programme.desc: A West Texas farm boy goes to the big city where he rides a mechanical bull, meets his future wife, and encounters the antagonism of an ex-con

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman, (1982, Drama)
programme.desc: Loner Zack Mayo (Richard Gere) enters Officer Candidate School to become a Navy pilot and in thirteen torturous weeks, he learns the importance of discipline, love, and friendship.

programme.title: Desperately Seeking Susan, (2017, Comedy)
programme.desc: A bored New Jersey suburban housewife's fascination with a kooky character she's read about in the personal columns leads to her being mistaken for the woman herself.

programme.title: Mr. Mom, (1983, Screwball)
programme.desc: Michael Keaton plays a husband and father who loses his job as an engineer at the auto manufacturing plant. After struggling to find another job, his wife lands a high paying position at an advertising agency.

programme.title: Clifford, (1994, Comedy)
programme.desc: A mischievous and obnoxious 10-year-old boy makes life pure hell for his bachelor uncle while his parents are in Hawaii.

programme.title: Big Top Pee-Wee, (1987, Screwball)
programme.desc: In Big Top Pee-Wee, I live on a country farm where I feed my barnyard animals pancake breakfasts and work on top-secret botanical experiments with my pet pig, Vance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible, (1996, Action)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II, (2000, Action)

programme.desc: Two young men from Jamaica climb to the top of the criminal world in Miami, with a constant presence of drugs, extortion, and deceit.

programme.title: The Gambler, (1974, Thriller)
programme.desc: James Caan portrays a compulsive gambler who can't quit or win. He falls into debt to the mob for $40,000 but seems to relish the thrill of gambling against the long shot.

programme.title: Rollerball, (1975, Action)
programme.desc: James Caan stars as a rollerball champ in this fast-hitting, action- packed glimpse of a future where a brutal, no-holds-barred sport takes the place of war, and murder is just part of the game.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Honor, friendship, revenge... As each duelist remembers what they're fighting for, the battle royal rages on where none of the duelists know where the next attack is going to come from!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey may have fought some of the fiercest fights in Battle City, but has all his training taught him to become an elite duelist? Joey's gonna show what he's made of in the conclusion to the four-man battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey thinks this duel can't turn any worse... but Marik has all the pieces necessary to summon The Winged Dragon of Ra! Can Joey prevent Marik from summoning the Egyptian God Card, or is victory simply not in the cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik transforms The Winged Dragon of Ra into its powerful form, the Egyptian God Phoenix! If Joey can't withstand the Phoenix's blazing fire, he'll lose the duel... plus his only chance to save Mai from her mental prison!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the rematch we've all been waiting for! Yugi and Kaiba square off for the first time since Duelist Kingdom in front of thousands of ravenous fans for the right to challenge Marik! It's time to duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba has all the monsters necessary to summon Obelisk the Tormentor to finish Yugi off! Though overwhelmed and outmatched, nothing is going to stop Yugi from trying to summon his Egyptian God first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon clashes against Kaiba's Obelisk the Tormentor, what will happen when two Egyptian Gods fight each other? It's time to find out which Egyptian God is truly stronger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the critical Battle City showdown with the fate of the world at stake: Yami Yugi vs. Marik! If Yami Yugi loses, Yugi is taking a permanent vacation into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Will Kaiba discover the secret behind Pegasus's strategies before he loses his soul, just like he did on his first trip to Duelist Kingdom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai's back to help Yugi take down Dartz and save the world from annihilation... or is a topsy-turvy twist in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has joined the enemy! Is she brainwashed, or is there some deeper reason for her unexpected transformation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Taking advantage of the Seal of Orichalcos, Mai coordinates her Harpie Ladies to whittle Joey's forces into waste! Is this the last we'll see of him, or will a legendary guardian recognize Joey as a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the potent powers of Claw of Hermos, Joey transforms Time Wizard into an almighty... hammer? Can Joey master the uncanny abilities of his new card to pound Mai's Harpie Ladies before they slash him to shreds?

programme.title: Luffy makes short work of a few hundred marines, the Franky Family takes down a giant, and the assassins of CP9 report back to Spandam!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Battle against giants! Open the second gate!

programme.title: Zoro’s quick thinking – and a little help from a giant frog – sends the sea train soaring into the sky on a collision course with armed guards and their canine companions!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Find a way out! Rocketman takes flight!

programme.title: Nami electrocutes the enemy with a Clima Tact attack, but the bad guys have the Straw Hats surrounded until the Franky Family shows up with a couple of sea monsters!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Catch up with luffy! The straw hats' all-out battle

programme.title: Zoro, Sanji, Nami, and Chopper try to catch up with their captain, Soge King is nowhere to be found, and Luffy runs head first into a battle with Blueno!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Robin betrayed! The motive of the world government!

programme.title: Luffy shows off his new strength in a brawl with Blueno, Soge King befriends a giant, and a hulking sea beast makes the ultimate sacrifice.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Give robin back! Luffy vs. Blueno!

programme.title: While Luffy continues his battle with Blueno, Soge King’s giant companions make their presence felt, and the assassins of CP9 experiment with Devil Fruits!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Don't stop! Hoist the counterattack signal!

programme.title: A blind Kingbull fights with his last breath to get the Straw Hats one step closer to their captain. Luffy kick his body into second gear to protect his friends from dangerous foes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Almost to luffy! Gather at the courthouse plaza!

programme.title: Luffy batters a baffled Blueno with his powerful new fighting style, and the cowardly Spandam begins to panic at the sound of the Straw Hats approaching!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everything is to protect my friends! Second gear activated!

programme.title: Luffy and his crew are finally reunited and ready to rescue Robin, but the raven-haired beauty remains reluctant to rejoin her former mates despite Franky’s urging.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Give us your answer, robin! The straw hats' outcry!

programme.title: Flash back to Robin’s days as a young girl, her dangerous pursuit of forbidden knowledge, and her encounter with a friendly giant.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Robin's past! The girl who was called a devil!

programme.title: Robin’s flashback continues with the heartbreaking arrival of her mother – and the government’s cruel and brutal invasion of a peaceful island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fated mother and daughter! The mother's name is olvia!

programme.title: Professor Clover reveals a startling and sinister theory about the World Government, Robin reunites with her mother, and a giant joins the fight!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The tragedy of ohara! The terror of the buster call!

programme.title: The painful story of Ohara – and Robin’s younger years – draws to a tragic close. Luffy declares war on the World Government, and Robin finally changes her tune!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Say you want to live! We are your friends!

programme.title: The Straw Hats are ready to begin the fight for Robin, but first, Luffy flashes back to memories of his childhood – and the man who made him want to become a pirate!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Jump towards the falls! Luffy's feelings!

programme.title: Zoro remembers the first time he met Luffy, and Usopp recalls the events that led him to join the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The ways of men! Zoro's techniques, usopp's dream!

programme.title: Nami’s heartbreaking past – and Luffy’s epic battle with Arlong – are recalled in this flashback to the early days of the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A bond of friendship woven by tears! Nami's world map!

programme.title: A flashback sheds light on how Sanji came to join the crew, and Chopper’s backstory is revealed through memories of a visit to a snow-covered island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Parting builds a man's character! Sanji and chopper!

programme.title: A flashback reveals Robin’s motives for cooperating with CP9, Nami’s shocking discovery about the archaeologist’s past, and Luffy’s determination to save his friend!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everything is for her friends! Robin in the darkness!

programme.title: Franky stands up to Spandam by destroying what the madman desires most, and the sound of the sea train spurs the Straw Hats to make a daring leap of faith!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I'm not gonna hand over the blueprints! Franky's decision!

programme.title: Luffy races to rescue Robin while the rest of the Straw Hats set off in search of the five keys needed to unlock the archaeologist!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Obtain the five keys! The straw hat pirates vs. Cp9!

programme.title: While Usopp and Zoro go head-to-head with a couple of animal assassins, Sanji teaches the most beautiful member of CP9 the secrets of making good tea!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Devil fruit powers! Kaku and jabra transform!

programme.title: Luffy runs into trouble trying to sail his way to Robin, Usopp and Zoro end up handcuffed together, and Sanji’s inability to kick a women may lead to serious injury!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I won't kick even if it costs me my life! Sanji's chivalry!

programme.title: Chimney and Gombe show Luffy the secret passage that leads to Robin, and Franky puts on a display of raw punching power thanks to a few bottles of cola!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fukurou's miscalculation! My cola is the water of life!

programme.title: While Franky’s brawl spills into the ocean, Usopp and Sanji attempt to overcome their handcuffs by outsmarting their opponents!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zoro busts out a new technique! The sword's name is sniper king?

programme.title: Determined not to be defeated by the heinous hair of a devious lion, Chopper risks life and limb by summoning the power of his Rumble Ball for a third time!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Travel back to ancient Japan for a madcap adventure starring the Straw Hats, some old friends and enemies, and a camel that eats lottery tickets!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Boss luffy returns! Is it a dream or reality? Lottery ruckus!

programme.title: The madcap throwback continues as Luffy and the gang – along with a crowd of characters from the Alabasta arc – competes for a priceless treasure hidden inside a tasty snack!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A big rice cake tossing race at the castle! Red nose's plot!

programme.title: Nami battles a bathing beauty and her lethal bubbles, Chopper unleashes his inner beast, and Luffy inches ever closer to catching up with Robin!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Bubble master kalifa! The soap trap closes in on nami!

programme.title: Franky has a painful encounter with monster Chopper, and Nami gets scrubbed too clean to fight! Meanwhile, Spandam accidentally invokes the deadly Buster Call!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Resounding bad news! Buster call invoked!

programme.title: Zoro uses Usopp as a decoy in his battle with the beasts, and Nami discovers the secret that could be the key to survival in her brawl with the bathing beauty!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Five namis? Nami strikes back with mirages!

programme.title: Franky and Nami come up with a plan to stop Chopper’s rampage, but it could prove deadly to the not-so-little reindeer. Usopp and Zoro are thrilled to finally be free of each other!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Nami's decision! Fire at the out-of-control chopper!

programme.title: Usopp’s ill-advised attempt at bravery threatens to get him killed, but a familiar foot spares the sniper’s life. Luffy struggles to even strike a formidable foe, and Franky races to deliver some very important keys!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hunter sanji makes an entrance? Elegy for a lying wolf!

programme.title: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fiery kicks! Sanji's full course of foot techniques!

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Timecop, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: Max Walker, an officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician who's intent on changing the past to control the future.

programme.title: Gamer, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: Set in a future world where humans can control other humans in mass-scale, multi-player online gaming environments, a star player (Butler) from a game called 'Slayers' looks to regain his independence while taking down the game's mastermind (Hall).

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Starship Troopers, (1997, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Courageous soldiers travel to the distant and desolate Klendathu system for the ultimate showdown between the species.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Riders In The Sky, (1949, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry helps a gal clear her father's name who is accused of murdering a gambler. When the leader of the gamblers gets involved, it's up to Gene and his comic pal Pat Buttram to outwit the badmen.

programme.title: Riders Of The Whistling Pines, (1949, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry believes he has accidentally shot a man, but learns that the guilt lies with men trying to stop a destructive moth infestation. Will modern chemicals be used to save the day, against Gene?

programme.title: The Shooting, (1968, Drama)
programme.desc: A mysterious woman persuades two cowboys to help her in a revenge scheme.

programme.title: Pardners, (1956, Drama)
programme.desc: A rich momma's boy returns west with the son of his murdered father's partner to foil a gang trying to gain control of his family ranch. They accidentally clean up the town.

programme.title: Alias Jesse James, (1959, Drama)
programme.desc: In this hilarious western spoof, insurance broker Milford Farnsworth (Bob Hope) unwittingly sells a life insurance policy worth $100,000 to the infamous Jesse James. Now, he has to figure out how to keep the deadliest outlaw in history alive!

programme.title: Along Came Jones, (1945, Drama)
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey, (1969, Drama)
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo, (1966, Drama)
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High, (1968, Drama)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Vera Cruz, (1954, Drama)
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Mean Girls, (2004, Screwball)
programme.desc: Cady thinks she understands "survival of the fittest." However, the law of the wild takes a whole new meaning when the homeschooled 15-year-old enters public high school for the first time.

programme.title: She's The Man, (2006, Screwball)
programme.desc: The laughs are non-stop when Viola, disguised as her twin brother, Sebastian, joins the high school boy's soccer team and helps win the big game while unexpectedly falling for Duke, the hot star forward.

programme.title: Orange County, (2002, Screwball)
programme.desc: Shaun is content to be a bright but unfocused surf slacker, until the day he discovers a novel by acclaimed author Martin Skinner. Inspired, he suddenly leaves behind Orange County to study creative writing Stanford University.

programme.title: Hot Rod, (2007, Screwball)
programme.desc: A comedy about a stunt man who’s never successfully landed a jump without wiping out and his attempt to master the biggest stunt of his life.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Juban District is having a contest to decide who can design the best wedding dress. Usagi, Rei, and all the girls in town compete.
programme.sub-title: A Girl's Dream: Usagi Becomes a Bride

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A photographer named Kijin Shinokawa holds a modeling contest. All the girls who have entered begin disappearing after Shinokawa photographs them!
programme.sub-title: Usagi's a Model: The Flash of the Monster Camera

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo’s friend Mika gives him a doll but Shingo unintentionally breaks the doll and hurts Mika’s feelings. Shingo decides to apologize.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi receives a love letter from Tuxedo Mask, stating that he’d like to meet her. She finds out that all the girls in town received the same letter.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Joy: A Love Letter from Tuxedo Mask

programme.desc: The girls search for a vacation spot so they can focus on training. Instead, they settle on a mansion that has a very eerie service staff.

programme.desc: Ami spots Nephrite and follows him to an animation studio that is making the Sailor V movie. Ami calls Usagi and Rei so they can investigate.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Kingdom of Diamonds is hosting a party to reveal their treasure to the world. Both the Sailor Guardians and the Dark Kingdom crash the party.
programme.sub-title: Romance Under the Moon: Usagi's First Kiss

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Naru has fallen in love with Masato Sanjoin. Knowing that Sanjoin is really Nephrite, Usagi tries to convince Naru to give up on her feelings.

programme.desc: Nephrite uncovers Sailor Moon’s identity as Usagi. His attempt to finish her off is cut short when he learns that Naru has been kidnapped by Zoisite.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A new girl named Makoto Kino transfers to Usagi’s school, but her tough attitude seems to scare everyone away. Usagi quickly becomes friends with her.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians grow in strength with its newest member Sailor Jupiter joining the team. Sailor Moon is appointed as team leader.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi learns that a transfer student named Ryo Urawa seems to have a crush on Ami, and tries to help him out.

programme.desc: Usagi and Naru attend an art exhibit by Yumemi Yumeno. Usagi and Mamoru are both asked by Yumemi to become models for her latest painting.

programme.desc: Usagi and Makoto discover Motoki has a girlfriend named Reika. His relationship is in jeopardy due to Reika’s chance to study abroad.

programme.desc: Grandpa Hino has become emotionally unstable, causing Rei to worry. The new apprentice Yuichiro tries to cheer her up.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and friends meet a girl who they believe holds the final Rainbow Crystal. But they realize it’s her pet cat that possesses the Rainbow Crystal!

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Umino seems to have fallen in love with Naru. Naru only considers Umino a friend, so Usagi decides to play Cupid and urges them to go on a date.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: When the exploits of a Sailor Moon imposter become quite the sensation, the real Sailor Guardians step in to investigate.

programme.desc: Tuxedo Mask is wounded while protecting Sailor Moon. The seven Rainbow Crystals gather and she is transformed into Serenity.

programme.desc: Usagi is haunted by dreams of Tuxedo Mask, who has been abducted by the Dark Kingdom. Minako takes Usagi to a popular hair salon hoping it will help.

programme.desc: 1970. Espen Ash Lad, filho de um pobre agricultor, embarca em uma missão perigosa com seus irmãos para salvar a princesa de um vilão conhecido como o Rei da Montanha. O objetivo é ganhar uma recompensa e salvar a fazenda da sua família da ruína. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Todos os Caminhos Levam a Roma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Maggie embarca em uma viagem para Itália, com Summer, sua filha adolescente. Mas ao chegar lá, Summer foge roubando o carro da mãe. Maggie contará com a ajuda de um ex-namorado para encontrar a filha. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Um Amor à Altura, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um homem encontra o celular de Diane e entra em contato para devolvê-lo. Quando se encontram, ela tem uma surpresa: ele tem apenas 1,36 m. Os dois logo se apaixonam, mas ela não está pronta para lidar com o preconceito de namorar um homem tão baixo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Garota em Chamas - Rebelião, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ela perdeu a memória ainda jovem, mas essas lembranças escondem segredos sombrios. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Profissional, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Anna é resgatada quando criança e treinada para se tornar assassina profissional. Anos depois, Moody, o homem que lhe ensinou tudo sobre sobrevivência, é assassinado. Ela se junta ao enigmático Rembrandt e promete ir até o fim em busca de vingança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Imortais, (1970)

programme.title: Em Nome do Pai, (1970)

programme.title: Condução Perigosa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Simon Keller, um misterioso ladrão, planeja roubar um banco e obriga um antigo piloto de corrida a dirigir o carro de fuga. Após o roubo, eles enfrentam policiais e mafiosos em uma alucinante perseguição na costa da Austrália. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.desc: 1970. A violência do preconceito racial causa um boicote aos transportes por parte da comunidade negra nos anos 1950. Uma aristocrata decide, por conveniência, ajudar sua empregada, mas seu marido a proíbe. Essa imposição faz com que as duas se unam. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Homem de Família, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um corretor de investimentos, a quem foi oferecida a oportunidade de ver como seria sua vida paralela, acorda e descobre que seu carro esportivo e a namorada se tornaram uma minivan e sua esposa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Instinto Materno, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após trauma, uma mãe solteira se muda com a filha para uma isolada fazenda no interior. Mas logo coisas sinistras voltam a acontecer e seus instintos maternos são colocados à prova novamente. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Tuff Turf - O Rebelde, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Prestes a terminar o ensino médio, Morgan é obrigado a mudar seu estilo de vida ao trocar de escola. Lá, ele acaba se envolvendo com a namorada do líder de uma gangue. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Recompensa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após passar 12 anos na prisão, o famoso arrombador de cofres Dom Hemingway volta para as ruas de Londres em busca da sua recompensa por ter ficado de boca fechada durante todo esse tempo. Ao lado do amigo Dickie, ele faz uma visita ao chefe do crime. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Dono da Festa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Van Wilder ficou famoso na cidade por organizar as melhores festas da faculdade. Porém, o veterano é forçado a mudar sua rotina de sete anos após perder a mesada do pai, deixando as festividades com os dias contados. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sobre Amor. Somente para Adultos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Homens e mulheres procuram por amor, sexo e alguma cura para o tédio em Moscou. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Espião por Acaso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Tim, um garoto de dez anos, se muda com sua família para um velho hotel situado na região costeira do país. Tim está sofrendo para se adaptar ao novo lar até que ele conhece Simon. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Radicão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Tommy vem de uma família de skatistas, mas nunca conseguiu aprender a se equilibrar nas rodas. Quando um valentão da cidade o desafia para uma competição, a única esperança do adolescente é obter ajuda de seu cachorro skatista. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Filmelier TV, (2026)
programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.title: Metaleiros de Jesus, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. No verão de 1986, Skip, um exibido produtor musical, decide promover uma turnê de ônibus da banda cristã de metal, 316, liderada pelo jovem Erik. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Andrew Eakle, Brian Baumgartner, Claire Bronson, Judd Nelson, Michael H. Cole, Rhoda Griffis, Shannon Hutchinson, Shawn Parsons, Gunner Willis, William Oliver Diretor: Chris White, Emily Reach

programme.title: O Prisioneiro, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Dylan deixou seu passado sombrio de crimes e encontrou o amor de sua vida, Maria. Agora ele trabalha como pescador em águas abertas, mas o diretor da prisão local tem outros planos. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Edward James Olmos, Esai Morales, Fernanda Urrejola, John Heard, Jon Huertas, Juan Pablo Raba, Juana Acosta, Laurence Fishburne, Louis Cheung, Mark Ho-nam Cheng Diretor: Paul Kampf, Christopher Sun

programme.title: Até o Fim da Noite, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. Jimmy Hill é um presidiário que recebe uma proposta irrecusável. Se conseguir pagar a dívida de um velho conhecido, poderá finalmente sair da prisão. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Barbara Jean Barrielle, Devon Werkheiser, Duane Hodges, Jared Abrahamson, Kayleigh Gilbert, Meinhard St. John, Michelle Way. Diretor: Joel Souza

programme.title: Megaterremoto, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. Enquanto um terremoto de enorme proporção ameaça atingir a cidade de São Francisco, uma equipe de especialistas em desastres naturais trabalha para salvar o maior número de vidas possível antes que a cidade seja completamente destruída. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Grant Bowler, Jack Pearson, Mckenzie Westmore, Mica Javier, Tola Lawal, Tori Griffith, Tyler Christopher, William Baldwin, McKenzie Westmore, Jessie B. Evans Diretor: Jared Cohn

programme.title: Meteoro: O Fim dos Tempos, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Quando um meteoro de enorme proporção ameaça destruir a Terra, um grupo de cientistas corre contra o tempo para encontrar uma maneira de salvar a humanidade da extinção. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Anthony Jensen, Brett Justin Koppel, Caroline Williams, Christina Semaan, Eva Ceja, Jeremiah Musgrove, Natalie Storrs, Patrick Labyorteaux, Joseph Michael Harris, Karan Sagoo Diretor: Noah Luke

programme.title: Infectados, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Após perder contato com um grupo de pesquisadores em uma ilha remota, uma corporação militar contrata um grupo de cientistas para descobrir o que deu errado. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Brandon Laatsch, Christina Jones, Eric Raymond Lim, Jeff Castle, Matt Lagan, Michael Cummings, Michelle Ehrman, Tate Ammons, Tess Panzer Diretor: Niko Pueringer, Sam Gorski

programme.title: Uma Aventura Selvagem, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Dois irmãos são atacados por animais selvagens enquanto procuram por seu pai desaparecido no meio da floresta amazônica. Mas à medida em que continuam sua aventura, eles começam a perceber que existe algo muito mais sinistro por trás desses ataques. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Alyson Gorske, Benny Bernard Jr., Christian Dejesus, Jack Pearson, Jamie Petitto, Rey'Von Miller, Richard Grieco, Wade Hunt Williams, Christian DeJesus, Alejandro Maysonet Diretor: Noah Luke

programme.title: Contágio em Alto Mar, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. A tripulação de uma traineira do oeste da Irlanda, abandonada no mar, luta por suas vidas contra um parasita crescente em seu abastecimento de água. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Ardalan Esmaili, Connie Nielsen, Dag Malmberg, Dougray Scott, Elie Bouakaze, Hermione Corfield, Jack Hickey, Olwen Fouéré Diretor: Neasa Hardiman

programme.title: Crimes Obscuros, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. O policial Tadek investiga um caso de assassinato não resolvido e encontra semelhanças do crime em um livro do artista polonês Krystov Kozlow. Ele começa a investigar a vida do escritor e da sua namorada, uma mulher misteriosa que trabalha num sex club. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Jim Carrey, Marton Csokas, Charlotte Gainsbourg, Kati Outinen, Agata Kulesza, Piotr Glowacki, Robert Wieckiewicz, Vlad Ivanov. Diretor: Alexandros Avranas

programme.title: Interligados, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. Um homem, que se culpa pela morte da sua filha única, retorna à cidade onde o fatídico acidente ocorreu. Lá, ele conhece uma bela e misteriosa mulher. Ambos sentem-se atraídos um pelo outro, mas ela também carrega um passado sombrio. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Hoyt Richards, Anabella Casanova, Johnny Williams, Bonnie Hellman, Scott King. Diretor: Tim French

programme.title: 1988. Uma misteriosa luz envolve a família Yamaji . Qual será o maior perigo de todos que o pote de herança prevê? E qual será o segredo da inscrição? Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura
programme.sub-title: 34 - A Caveira Assassina Monstro Feiticeiro Gomaz Família Yamashi e Rei Yagyū(Kinin Reiha)
programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E34

programme.title: 1988. Surge o Deus Jirai, que se manifestou para defender Toha da família de Feitceiros que invocou o monstro gigante Yonma. Deus Jirai seria a entidade protetora de Jiraiya? Algo extraordinário está para acontecer! Lute Jiraiya! Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura
programme.sub-title: 35 - O Desafio dos Togakure Monstro Feiticeiro Gomaz, Commando e Killer Tōha(Jiraiya) e Deus Jirai
programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E35

programme.title: 1988. Em um canto obscuro da cidade grande uma sombra negra move-se sorrateiramente. Jiraiya investiga incidentes que ocorreram segundo as previsões de um médium suspeito. Será que este médium tem alguma previsão para nosso ninja? Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura, Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura
programme.sub-title: 36 - O Feitiço do Gato Preto Yaminin Devilcat Tōha(Jiraiya), Kei(Himenin Emiha), Manabu e Henri Rakuchin
programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E36

programme.title: 1988. O super guerreiro, o Robô Kaima Skraid, já foi uma vez banido pelo Imperador Crisis e General Jark de suas operações por perder o controle e não respeitar ordens devido a seu imenso poder destrutivo. Gatezon pretende reconstruí-lo para confrontar RX. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E11

programme.title: 1988. O Feiticeiro Kaima Cerebron é capaz de entrar nos sonhos das pessoas e manipular suas mentes. Com isso, o próximo alvo do Império Crisis nada mais é que a própria Reiko, fazendo-a atacar e temer Issamu. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E12

programme.title: 1988. Parecia ser um presente vindo dos céus... Uma bela garota, Kirara, junta de seu pai, aparecem dos céus, Shigeru e Kengo veem tudo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E13

programme.title: 1988. Há uma conspiração em curso no Forte Crisis. Maribaron executa uma missão que consiste sequestrar uma jovem garota para se transformar na Princesa Garonia, tentando enganar desde o Imperador Crisis até mesmo o General Jark e os outros quatro comandantes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E14

programme.title: 1988. Issamu está desesperadamente em busca de Hitomi, que foi levada para o Mundo Kaima. O que o aguarda lá é uma perigosa armadilha criada por Maribaron. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E15

programme.title: 1988. Um homem misterioso surge diante de Issamu, que está em busca de Hitomi. Ele se chama Joe Kazumi, que fugiu do Império Crisis. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.sub-title: A Princesa do Vale dos Milagres
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E16

programme.title: 1988. Issamu, Joe e Shigeru são capturados e levados para o templo da Princesa Garonia. Maribaron ordena que Joe e Shigeru sejam eliminados. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E17

programme.title: 1988. Shigeru quer observar esquilos-voadores que atingem 10 mil metros de altura no céu. Porém, um esquilo em específico chama a atenção de Issamu e Joe. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E18

programme.title: 1988. Nascem dois sóis em Tóquio, mais uma operação maléfica em movimento pelo Império Crisis. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E19

programme.title: 1988. Bancos são roubados e uma única prova do crime intriga a polícia: cascos de bananas. Issamu e Joe Kazumi levam o caso a sério e tentam bolar um plano para atrair alguém aficcionado por bananas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E20

programme.title: 1985. O cozinheiro espacial Bragul e Macgaren se unem para raptar Miya e atrair Jaspion para uma emboscada. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E37

programme.title: 1985. Miki é uma menina com poderes sobrenaturais. Resgatada por Macgaren de um desmoronamento ela é pressionada a ajudá-lo. Macgaren usa o poder de Miki para corromper os cidadãos da vila. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E38

programme.title: 1985. A irmã da bruxa Kilza, Kilmaza, surge com os ninjas espaciais e põe em prática seu plano de fazer as pessoas odiarem Jaspion. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E39

programme.title: 1985. Kilmaza implanta diamantes falsos na terra para corromper o coração das pessoas e trazer caos ao país Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E40

programme.title: 1985. John Tiger é um ex-assassino profissional e amigo de infância de Jaspion. Abandonou o caminho do crime com muito tempo e cuida de um orfanato, mas Kilmaza surge para enfeitiçá-lo. Jaspion terá que enfrentá-lo em um duelo mortal para quebrar o feitiço. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E41
